_doc: CANONICAL CONFIG â€” single source of truth for rule values. Drift between this file and any prompt/code is a kill-switch event (premarket Step 1a enforces). When you change a value here, also change the embedded constant in the prompt that uses it (heartbeat.md, simulator_real.py, etc.). The pin check verifies they match next premarket.
rule_version_v15_3_notes: v15.3 LIVE 2026-06-01 per J authorization ('we need to add what we learned over the weekend, last engine didn't perform well, it needs updated'). Adds RIBBON CONVICTION GATE â€” three pre-entry checks that encode what J visually checks before entering: (A) ribbon spreading >=5c/3bars, (B) ribbon fresh <=15 bars, (C) no midday single-trendline. Source: 16-month real-fills IS/OOS: OOS WR 0.77 +28.3/c WF 4.29 (all 12 threshold combos WR>=0.71 = robust plateau). Anchor: 5/6 PASS (5/04 kept +53.6/c). Combined with V14E exits: OOS WR 0.73. Revert: set min_ribbon_momentum_cents=0, max_ribbon_duration_bars=999, midday_trendline_gate=false. Inherits all v15.2 doctrine.
rule_version_v15_2_notes: v15.2 LIVE 2026-05-18 evening per J ratification ('Lets do option A, B, and D'). Adds Step 0a (numeric alert context read) to BOTH heartbeats. No filter changes; alert is corroboration not authorization. Pipeline: numeric_pulse fires every 15s during RTH (pure Python, $0 cost), writes alerts to numeric-alert.jsonl when (conf>=0.65 + contra-trend + level-proximate). Heartbeat now reads last-60s alerts as ATTENTION cue. Same tick still applies all 11 filters. Companion change: fast_path_executor live-mode enabled via automation/state/fast-path-live-enabled.flag sentinel (J ratified). Inherits all v15.1 doctrine (entry window 09:35-15:00 ET continuous, 15:00 cutoff, closed-bar R1 filter, per-tier strike, etc.). Revert: edit this file rule_version to 'v15.1' + revert heartbeat.md RULE_VERSION constants + remove Step 0a sections + delete fast-path-live-enabled.flag.
rule_version_notes: v15.1 LIVE 2026-05-14 evening per J authorization ('any time between 9:35 - and 3pm is fair game for ENTRIES. theta will kill us after 3. we must exit before EOD'). Two doctrine changes from v15: (a) 14:00-15:00 ET no_trade_window REMOVED â€” entry window now CONTINUOUS [09:35, 15:00) ET; (b) entry cutoff hardened from 15:50 â†’ 15:00 ET (theta protection); (c) R1 closed-bar fix shipped in heartbeat.md SPY 5m read â€” count=2 â†’ count=3 + bar_close_et<=now_et filter to discard TV's in-progress bar at index [-1]. Existing positions still flatten by 15:50 ET hard time stop (Gamma_EodFlatten safety net at 15:55 ET unchanged). Sources: docs/HEARTBEAT-CHART-DATA-AUDIT-2026-05-14.md, docs/R4-HEARTBEAT-MISALIGNMENT-2026-05-14.md (5 of 46 ticks today MISALIGNED-CRITICAL), docs/T48-FOLLOWUP-FIRE-EVENING-2026-05-14.md. Inherits all v15 v14_enhanced doctrine (per-tier strike, -20% stop, trailing PL chandelier, tp1 0.50, runner 2.50, max-premium hard gate).
rule_version_revert_command: To revert v15.1 â†’ v15: (1) edit this file rule_version 'v15.1' â†’ 'v15' and rule_version_ratified_at '2026-05-14' â†’ '2026-05-13', (2) edit automation/prompts/heartbeat.md RULE_VERSION='v15.1' â†’ 'v15' AND restore the 14:00-15:00 no_trade_window text on lines 308 + 329, (3) edit automation/prompts/premarket.md RULE_VERSION_EXPECTED='v15.1' â†’ 'v15'. To revert further v15 â†’ v14: cp automation/prompts/heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and update both pin files to 'v14'.
_heartbeat_section: Per-tick parameters consumed by automation/prompts/heartbeat.md and backtest/lib/{filters,orchestrator,simulator_real}.py. Operating principle 4: drift = sync immediately.
_exits_section: CHART-STOP-PRIMARY 2026-06-18: premium stop DEMOTED to a wide catastrophe cap (-50% both sides). The PRIMARY invalidation is now the chart-level stop (rejection_level +/- chart_stop_buffer) + ribbon-flip-back + profit-lock chandelier + 15:40 time stop. The premium stop only fires on a genuine catastrophe (gap past -50%). Evidence (real-fills, 2025-01..2026-05-29, n=26): A (bear-10/bull-8) total $8,160 WR 38%; B2 (both -50) total $16,671 WR 65%; edge_capture INVARIANT at +$1,340 (no J-edge regression); DSR PASS PSR 0.998. Blueprint Phase 2a + C2/C3/missed_week. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/chart-stops-ab-2026-06-18.json. TP1 = chart-level OR +50% premium fallback, 66.7% off at TP1 (2/3 at TP1, 1/3 runner). Time stop 15:40 ET (L110). Runner target 2.5x.
_premium_stop_pct_doc: CATASTROPHE CAP (bull/generic), 2026-06-18: -0.08 -> -0.50. Was the PRIMARY bull stop; now a wide backstop only — chart/ribbon/profit-lock are primary. Bull-side full-history sweep: -8% total $8,160 / bull WR 33%; -50% total $14,278 / bull WR 78% (0 premium-stop exits). NOTE: BULLISH_RECLAIM is DRAFT per OP-16; this cap only prevents catastrophic whipsaw, it does NOT authorize the bull setup. Revert: set -0.08.
_premium_stop_pct_bear_doc_2026_06_18: CATASTROPHE CAP (bear), 2026-06-18: -0.10 -> -0.50. Chart-stop-primary demotion. Full-history real-fills bear sweep (n=17): -10% bear_pnl $4,510/WR 41% (10 premium-stop exits) -> -50% bear_pnl $6,903/WR 59% (5 premium-stop exits). Empirical peak is -15% (bear_pnl $7,366) but -50% wide cap is chosen for robustness/regime-agnosticism per blueprint. Knob proven LIVE (at -2% bear trades whipsaw to -$71). Revert: set -0.10. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/chart-stops-ab-2026-06-18.json.
_entry_section: v15.1 (LIVE 2026-05-14 evening): entries [09:35, 15:00) ET continuous. 14:00-15:00 mid-day blackout REMOVED per J. Existing positions still flatten by 15:50 ET hard time stop. v11/v12 trigger asymmetry preserved (bear â‰¥1, bull â‰¥2). Filter 9 vol_mult 0.7Ã— (catches morning rejection bars).
_entry_no_trade_window_et_history: v11â†’v15 had 14:00-15:00 ET mid-day blackout. v15.1 (2026-05-14 evening per J): REMOVED â€” entry window now CONTINUOUS [09:35, 15:00) ET. Theta is the problem after 3pm, not mid-day. Mid-day blackout was leaving setups on the table.
_vix_section: Two distinct VIX threshold ladders. (a) iv_regime bands (LOW/MID/HIGH) used by premarket for context tagging. (b) entry_thresholds used by heartbeat filters 8a/8b. Cache refresh logic in heartbeat refreshes when value within Â±0.20 of any entry_threshold.
_vix_bull_hard_cap_doc: VIX_BULL_HARD_CAP lowered 22→18 (Rank 35, 2026-06-17). Blocks all CALL entries when VIX>=18 (was VIX>=22). IS +$221 (n=4 blocks), OOS +$219 (n=1 block), WF=5.946 PASS, 1/4 SW hurt (W1-2025H1 -$372), anchor OK. Evidence thin (n_oos_blocked=1) but direction clear. SAFE only — aggressive has VIX<30 cap, different baseline. Revert: set bull_hard_cap: 22.0 and restore heartbeat.md filter 9. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/vix-bull-hard-cap-01.json.
_vix_bear_hard_cap_doc: VIX_BEAR_HARD_CAP (2026-06-18): block all BEAR entries when VIX >= 23.0. IS: n=9 blocked (VIX≥23), WR=0%, total=-$790, IS_delta=+$790. OOS: n=6 blocked, WR=17%, total=-$420, OOS_delta=+$420. WF_per_trade=0.797 PASS, SW_hurt=0/3 (cleanest gate). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J standing 'no blocker' directive. Root cause: VIX>=23 = high-fear env → put premium expensive → -10% stop fires on tiny adverse moves (C3/L149). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_vix_bear_hard_cap.json. Revert: set 0 or remove key. Note: heartbeat.md activation pending (add FILTER for vix >= vix_bear_hard_cap block bears).
_sizing_section: v13b quality-tiered. ELITE = trigger set includes confluence OR sequence_rejection/reclaim. BASE = otherwise. $0-$2k tier skips quality scaling (capital constraint).

position_sizing_tiers.structure: 2 TP1 + 1 conservative runner (no upsize â€” capital constraint)

_ribbon_conviction_gate_section: v15.3 RIBBON CONVICTION GATE fields. REVERT 2026-06-16 (L107): Gates A+B disabled â€” correct real-fills baseline WF=-1.308 (gate was removing profitable trades; original ratification used BS-sim + wrong stop, producing fake WF=4.29). Gate C (midday_trendline_gate) intact â€” standalone OOS evidence unchanged (-8.6/trade on 307 trades). A+B disabled by setting min_ribbon_momentum_cents=0 and max_ribbon_duration_bars=999.
_min_ribbon_momentum_cents_doc: Gate A DISABLED (set 0). Was 5c. Reverted 2026-06-16: L107 showed correct params WF=-1.308. Set >0 to re-enable â€” but run OOS first.
_max_ribbon_duration_bars_doc: Gate B DISABLED (set 999). Was 15. Reverted 2026-06-16: same L107 finding. Set <999 to re-enable â€” but run OOS first.
_midday_trendline_gate_doc: Gate C: if true, block entries where ONLY trigger is trendline_rejection and time is 11:30-14:00 ET. Single-trigger midday trendline = -8.6/trade historically (307 OOS trades). Revert: set false to disable.
_block_level_rejection_doc: LEVEL_REJECTION_GATE (2026-06-17): block all BEAR-side LEVEL-tier level_rejection entries. Engine-level: IS +$13,181 (n=17 removed, n=5 unlocked), OOS +$682, WF=0.842, 0 HURT sub-windows, anchor OK (+$1,478 on 4/29). Auto-ratified per OP-22 (J: 'I am no blocker'). A/B scorecard: analysis/recommendations/level-rejection-gate-01.json. Revert: set false.
_block_elite_bull_doc: BLOCK_ELITE_BULL_VIX0_25 (2026-06-18, extended from VIX [15,17.5) to [0,25)): block ELITE+level_reclaim (BULL) entries when 0 <= VIX < 25.0. IS: 14 trades removed (n=13 at VIX<15 WR=15.4% total=-$106 + n=1 at VIX 15-17.5 already blocked), IS_delta=+$113. OOS: net 2 fewer trades, OOS_delta=+$63. WF=3.890 PASS, SW_hurt=1/3 (SW3 -$14 due to 2 IS winners blocked). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Key insight: all IS conf+lvl_rec bulls fire at VIX<17.5; all OOS failures fire at VIX 17.8-18.0 (just above old cap). Extension is zero IS cost for VIX[17.5,25) and removes the OOS losers. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_block_elite_bull_all_vix.json. Revert: set vix_low=15.0, vix_high=17.5.
_entry_bar_body_pct_min_doc: ENTRY_BAR_BODY_PCT_GATE (2026-06-18): block BEAR entries where entry bar body_pct < 0.20 (doji/wick-dominant = no directional conviction). IS n=113->98 (-15 removed, WR=31.2% avg=-$29), IS_delta=+$295. OOS n=24->20 (-4 removed, WR=0%), OOS_delta=+$566 (LARGER than IS). WF_per_trade=7.193 PASS, SW_hurt=1/3 (SW3 early-2026 -$314), anchor unchanged (+$0). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J standing 'no blocker' directive. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_entry_body_gate.json. Revert: set 0.0.
_min_trendline_bear_spread_cents_doc: REJECTED 2026-06-18 (TZ bug). Original test had tz_localize('UTC') on naive ET timestamps → ~5h offset, premarket ribbon values. With correct tz_localize('America/New_York'), IS_delta=-11 (G1 FAIL). No threshold in 1c-100c passes G1+G2 simultaneously. Dormant knob (default 0 = disabled). Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_trendline_bear_spread_gate.json.
_block_bull_1100_1200_doc: BLOCK_BULL_1100_1200 (2026-06-18): block ALL BULL (C) entries 11:00-12:00 ET. IS: n=11 WR=9.1% total=-$89 (worst TOD bucket, 10/11 losers). OOS: n=1 blocked (2026-05-20 11:20 confluence+level_reclaim -$42). OP-22: IS_delta=+89, OOS_delta=+42, WF=5.22, SW_hurt=1/3, G5 pass (anchor trades are PUT/BEAR, unaffected). All 5 OP-22 gates PASS. Auto-ratified 2026-06-18 per OP-22 + J standing 'no blocker' directive. Scorecard: analysis/recommendations/safe_bull_1100_1200_gate.json. Revert: set false.
_v15_pending_section: v15 fields LIVE 2026-05-13 evening (was STAGED earlier in the day; rule_version flipped from v14 to v15 per J authorization 'v15 can go live that is chill lets let er rip'). Heartbeat NOW consumes these via the per-tier strike + max-premium hard gate added under the v15 ratification doctrine. Backup at automation/prompts/heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md preserves v14 byte-for-byte. Revert command in rule_version_revert_command. Doctrine change: docs/DOCTRINE-CHANGE-2026-05-13-EVENING.md + docs/V15-ACTIVATION-2026-05-13.md.
_v15_data_source: analysis/recommendations/trade-5-13-variants.json (4,410 combos on 5/13 11:38 bullish reclaim signal). Top combo for J's $1K-account style: 742C Ã— 3 @ $0.19 = $57 cost â†’ +$218 (+383%) per OTM-3 + qty=3 + no-PL pattern.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-3 (J style â€” lean + leveraged)
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: 742C @ $0.19 type entries. Buy under $100, sell over $100. Big-multiple gains on directional moves.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-2
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Balanced: enough premium to absorb noise, cheap enough to compound.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: OTM-1 / ATM
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Wider strikes start consuming returns; bias slightly OTM.

v15_strike_offset_per_tier.label: ITM-2 (current v14)
v15_strike_offset_per_tier.rationale: Production v14 default. Higher delta, smoother P&L curve. Capital available.

v15_max_premium_pct_of_account.rationale: 1K account: max $400 per trade (4 strikes worth at qty=3). Forces OTM bias even if v14 chooses ITM-2.

v15_hard_gate_logic: If (qty Ã— premium Ã— 100) > (account_equity Ã— max_pct), reduce qty or skip OTM until fits. Prevents 315%-leverage situations like the actual 5/13 trade if account were $1K (15Ã— $2.10 = $3,150 = 315% of $1K).
v15_profit_lock_decision_data: T50 trailing-PL test 2026-05-13 22:16 ET: B1 trailing 20% wins aggregate ($36,621 vs fixed $36,450 = +0.5%) with LOWER concentration (top5 32% vs 37.1%). On 5/13 738C trade hypothetical: trailing 20% rides to ~$4.34 (~+107% vs fixed PL caps at $2.23 = +6%, vs no-PL actual $5.43 = +159%). Trailing 20% = best balance of big-day upside + chop-day protection. See analysis/recommendations/v14_enhanced-pl-variants.json.
v15_ratification_status: LIVE 2026-05-13 evening â€” heartbeat.md updated, rule_version flipped to v15. Production heartbeat now consumes per-tier strike + per-tier max_premium_pct + trailing profit-lock + 09:35 entry gate + -20% bear stop + tp1 0.50 + runner 2.50. v14 preserved at heartbeat-v14-prod-backup.md. Revert command in rule_version_revert_command.
_risk_section: Hard caps from CLAUDE.md Rule 5 + Rule 6 (Gamma-Safe account: 30% per-trade risk, -30% daily kill switch). risk-rules.md is stale â€” it reflects the original aggressive-only 50% numbers, not the dual-account split. Safe = 30%, Bold = 50% (automation/state/aggressive/params.json).
_first_entry_rule_section: Added 2026-05-08. If a setup name has been entered AND stopped out today, no second entry on that setup name today. Was in risk-rules.md doctrine, not in heartbeat code. Now both (sync).
_macro_section: Macro Bias Inheritance v2 â€” HARD VETO if event â‰¤ 120 min ahead AND counter-trend to today-bias.bias. SOFT MODIFIER 120-240 min raises bull threshold to â‰¥10/11, lowers bear to â‰¥7/10.
_calendar_freshness_section: Premarket Step 1b checks macro-calendar.json#refresh_log[] last entry. > 7 days = stale, surface as journal warning. Sunday weekly-review owns the actual 30-day fetch.
_liquidity_gate_section: Pre-entry liquidity check on candidate strike. Hard rejections per risk-rules.md.
_catalyst_section: Catalyst-awareness flags. Set true to graduate from journal-only to filter-active. Default: aware-only.
_dealer_section: Options dealer levels are written to key-levels.json as Liquidity tier; heartbeat treats them like any other level (price, distance) â€” no special dealer-aware logic. Set true to start tagging dealer-level interactions in journal.
_liquidity_tier_section: Volume Profile / AVWAP shelves are added to key-levels.json by premarket. Heartbeat treats them like any other level. No flag needed â€” Pine indicator availability is the only gate.
_dark_pool_section: EOD aggregates yesterday's TRF block prints into Liquidity tier for tomorrow. Set false to disable the EOD step (e.g., if Alpaca rate-limits trade pulls).
_session_timing_section: Task Scheduler trigger times. Used by automation/morning-kickoff.md and setup/install-tasks.ps1.
_resilience_section: Self-healing harness invariants. Kept here for visibility â€” actual values are also embedded in _shared.ps1 (drift between the two = bug to fix).
_premium_stop_pct_bear_doc: SUPERSEDED 2026-06-18 by CHART-STOP-PRIMARY (see _premium_stop_pct_bear_doc_2026_06_18 above — bear stop now -0.50 catastrophe cap). History: TIGHTER_STOP 2026-06-17 took -0.20 -> -0.10 (IS +$8,705 / OOS +$1,802, scorecard analysis/recommendations/tighter-stop-01.json). The chart-stop-primary demotion then widened -0.10 -> -0.50 because at -10% the premium stop already never bound on bear winners; a wide cap rides them while the chart/ribbon/profit-lock exits stay primary.
